Procalcitonin Test

Procalcitonin Test 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a procalcitonin test? 
A procalcitonin test measures the level of procalcitonin in your blood. Normally, you have very low levels of procalcitonin in your blood. But if you have a serious bacterial infection , the cells in many parts of your body will release procalcitonin into your bloodstream. A high level of procalcitonin in your blood may be a sign of a serious infe
